reports.plain_language_failure: Build-loop said the new plugin behavior was available, but the installed copy still ran the old instructions.
reports.why_it_happened: The source files changed, but the installed runtime copy was not checked before the report. The workflow lacked a cache-sync verifier.
failure_map: User expects new plugin behavior.
Runtime still uses the old installed bundle.
Source and installed cache drifted apart.
The release path lacked a required cache-sync verifier.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing cache-sync verifier before claiming runtime behavior changed.

root_cause.description: The workflow reported source state as runtime state without a cache-sync check.

evidence.detail: Installed cache version differs from source version.
Plugin source files contain the new behavior.

pruned_causes.evidence: The source files contain the intended change.

reports.tradeoffs: A cache verifier adds release friction but prevents false runtime claims.
reports.impact: Users may trust a fix that is not installed. Engineers waste time debugging source that is not running.
reports.prevention_control: Require a cache-sync check before reporting plugin runtime behavior.

reports.plain_language_failure: One path worked after the change, but another path still used the old behavior.
reports.why_it_happened: The plan owned the changed helper but did not trace its callers. The workflow lacked a scope verifier for interface changes.
failure_map: A user path still behaves the old way.
A downstream caller was not updated.
The plan only owned the helper file.
Modified interfaces did not require a caller-scope verifier.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing caller-scope verifier for modified interface work.

root_cause.description: The interface changed without a required audit of caller sites.

evidence.detail: The helper changed while a caller kept the old assumptions.
A focused regression test shows the second path still returns old output.

pruned_causes.hypothesis: The changed helper did not run.
pruned_causes.evidence: The first path proves the helper ran with the new behavior.

reports.tradeoffs: Caller audits add planning time but reduce under-scoped fixes.
reports.impact: Users see inconsistent behavior across paths. Engineers may ship partial fixes.
reports.prevention_control: Require scope-auditor or equivalent caller grep for modified interface plans.

reports.plain_language_failure: The tests passed, but the page still crashed when opened.
reports.why_it_happened: Validation stopped at unit tests and did not open the affected route. The workflow lacked a runtime smoke gate for changed user-facing routes.
failure_map: User opens a page and sees a crash.
The component throws during live render.
The test suite mocked the render path.
Changed routes did not require runtime smoke validation.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing runtime smoke gate for changed user-facing route files.

root_cause.description: Static and unit checks passed while live route rendering was untested.

evidence.detail: The unit suite exits successfully.
The browser route logs a render error.

pruned_causes.hypothesis: The dev server failed to start.

reports.tradeoffs: Runtime smoke costs extra seconds but catches failures static checks miss.
reports.impact: Users hit a broken page even though CI looked green.
reports.prevention_control: Run a route-level runtime smoke check when user-facing route files change.

reports.plain_language_failure: The new control appeared, but it had no clear loading or error behavior.
reports.why_it_happened: The plan named the component but did not name every input and output state. The workflow lacked a complete interface contract for the changed surface.
failure_map: User sees a control with unclear feedback.
Loading and error states are absent.
The component plan covered layout but not state outputs.
UI work did not require full input-output contract coverage.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing UI input-output contract gate for changed surface states.

root_cause.description: The UI change was implemented without a required state and output contract.

evidence.detail: The component handles click but not loading or error state.
The UI contract checklist has no row for failure output.

pruned_causes.evidence: The click handler fires in the component test.

reports.tradeoffs: The contract gate adds planning detail but prevents polished incomplete surfaces.
reports.impact: Users cannot tell whether the action is working or failed.
reports.prevention_control: Add a UI contract gate that requires changed surfaces to name inputs, outputs, states, fallback, and validation.

reports.plain_language_failure: A dependency looked unnecessary until its install path was traced.
reports.why_it_happened: The audit listed the package tree but did not trace why the package was installed. The workflow lacked a provenance check for surprising dependencies.
failure_map: User asks why a dependency exists.
The answer only lists current packages.
Install history and importer path are not traced.
Dependency audits do not require provenance evidence.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing dependency-provenance check for surprising package findings.

root_cause.description: The audit stopped at inventory rather than tracing the dependency source.

evidence.detail: Package lock shows the dependency in the tree.
Importer search identifies the package owner.

pruned_causes.evidence: Importer search shows a live reference.

reports.tradeoffs: Provenance tracing costs more than inventory but answers the actual why.
reports.impact: Engineers avoid removing packages that still support live code.
reports.prevention_control: Require dependency audits to include package owner, importer, and install-history evidence.

reports.plain_language_failure: The build looked newly noisy even though those warnings already existed.
reports.why_it_happened: The criterion asked for zero warnings instead of no new warnings. The workflow lacked a baseline comparison guard.
failure_map: User sees the run reported as noisy.
Existing warnings are counted as new failure.
Validation has no baseline from the same command.
Warning criteria did not require relative comparison.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing baseline-comparison guard for warning and lint criteria.

root_cause.description: A pre-existing warning was treated as a new regression because no baseline was captured.

evidence.detail: Current command output contains the warning.
Baseline command output contains the same warning.

pruned_causes.hypothesis: The new patch introduced the warning.
pruned_causes.evidence: The baseline output already contains the warning.

reports.tradeoffs: Baseline capture adds a command run but prevents false failures.
reports.impact: Teams avoid fixing unrelated warning debt during scoped builds.
reports.prevention_control: Add a baseline verifier for warning criteria that compares current output against a same-command baseline.

reports.plain_language_failure: A sandbox limit looked like a code regression.
reports.why_it_happened: The failing command hit an environment boundary, but the report treated it as app behavior. The workflow lacked an environment classification check.
failure_map: Validation command fails.
Failure is reported as code breakage.
Sandbox or network boundary caused the command error.
Validation did not classify environment boundaries before assigning cause.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing environment-boundary classification check for failed validation commands.

root_cause.description: The workflow mapped a sandbox restriction to code failure without confirming the boundary.

evidence.detail: Command output reports host resolution or permission failure.
Sandbox configuration restricts that operation.

pruned_causes.hypothesis: The app route returned a server error.
pruned_causes.evidence: The command never reached the app route.

reports.tradeoffs: Classifying boundaries takes a small detour but prevents false code fixes.
reports.impact: Engineers preserve good code and report the real validation gap.
reports.prevention_control: Add an environment-boundary classification check for failed validation commands.

reports.plain_language_failure: Files changed under one workflow while another workflow was still active.
reports.why_it_happened: The session saw the changed files but did not coordinate ownership before editing. The workflow lacked a live peer and file-claim guard.
failure_map: A session observes unexpected file changes.
Two workflows touch overlapping files.
Peer state is not checked before shared-file edits.
Coordination did not require live presence and file-claim verification.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing peer-presence and file-claim guard before overlapping edits.

root_cause.description: Concurrent sessions edited overlapping files without a required coordination check.

evidence.detail: Rally Point presence shows another active session.
Git diff shows overlapping changed files.

pruned_causes.hypothesis: The file was reverted by the test runner.
pruned_causes.evidence: Git history shows another session committed the path.

reports.tradeoffs: Coordination checks add overhead only when peers exist.
reports.impact: Uncoordinated edits can overwrite work or confuse validation.
reports.prevention_control: Check Rally Point presence and file claims before shared-file edits.

reports.plain_language_failure: The unit test passed because the fixture skipped the real runtime path.
reports.why_it_happened: The fixture mocked the behavior being validated, so the test could not catch the real failure. The workflow lacked a fixture-realism check.
failure_map: A tested feature fails at runtime.
The unit test passes.
The fixture replaces the real runtime branch.
Validation did not require a fixture-realism check for the behavior under test.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing fixture-realism check for tests that validate runtime behavior.

root_cause.description: The test verified a mock path instead of the runtime path that users exercise.

evidence.detail: The fixture stubs the service method under test.
Runtime trace enters a different branch.

pruned_causes.evidence: The assertion would fail if the real branch were exercised.

reports.tradeoffs: Fixture checks may require a broader smoke test but reduce false confidence.
reports.impact: Users hit failures that local tests cannot see.
reports.prevention_control: Add a fixture-realism check that requires runtime-path confirmation when tests mock the behavior under review.

reports.plain_language_failure: The implementer changed the requested file but did not see a required rule.
reports.why_it_happened: The brief named the file and task but omitted a required invariant. The workflow lacked a context-packet completeness guard.
failure_map: A patch violates a known rule.
The implementer brief did not include the rule.
The plan depended on unstated context.
Dispatch did not require invariant and ownership completeness.
reports.system_control_failure: Missing context-packet completeness guard for invariants and ownership boundaries.

root_cause.description: The implementation brief lacked the invariant needed to make the correct change.

evidence.detail: The patch changes the owned file but violates the invariant.
The dispatch brief has no invariant or ownership section.

pruned_causes.hypothesis: The implementer edited the wrong file.
pruned_causes.evidence: The changed file matches the owned-file list.

reports.tradeoffs: Completeness checks make briefs longer but reduce hidden-context failures.
reports.impact: The team gets technically scoped work that still violates project intent.
reports.prevention_control: Require implementer briefs to include invariants, ownership, non-owned files, and verification contract.
